purpose: Untrack the 225 stale, non-deterministic sandbox-profile files left behind by WO 019. WO 019 ignored future profiles via .gitignore but did not untrack the already-committed ones. WO 021 removes them from the git index without deleting from disk.

index_changes.method: git ls-files -z reports/os_isolation_runtime/profiles/ | xargs -0 git rm --cached
index_changes.why_not_shell_glob: git rm --cached reports/os_isolation_runtime/profiles/*.sb fails because the shell glob expands to include the on-disk files that .gitignore (WO 019) now hides; only the index-bound `git ls-files | xargs` form is safe.

make_verify_drift.stdout_tail: OK: regenerated artifacts match committed state.

commands_run: git ls-files -z reports/os_isolation_runtime/profiles/ | xargs -0 git rm --cached
what_is_now_fixed: WO019-RES-1 closed: zero stale profile files remain in the git index.
Repo no longer carries 225 non-deterministic per-run artifacts as if they were canonical evidence.
Combined with WO 019 .gitignore rule, profile drift cannot recur.
what_remains_unresolved: WO019-RES-2: Makefile default PYTHON=python3 resolves to system Python without project deps.
